name: notaria
description: Sitio de Notaría Martínez (Vite + TypeScript + Tailwind v4) desplegado en Firebase Hosting.

scripts.check: tsc --noEmit && prettier --check "src/**/*.{ts,css}" README.md firebase.json package.json index.html .github/workflows/*.yml && prettier --check --parser json .firebaserc
scripts.format: prettier --write "src/**/*.{ts,css}" README.md firebase.json package.json index.html .github/workflows/*.yml && prettier --write --parser json .firebaserc
